scripts.build: node generate-data-zsh.js && esbuild src/app.js --bundle --outfile=dist/bundle.js && cp public/index.html dist/index.html && cp data.zsh dist/data.zsh
scripts.dev: node generate-data-zsh.js && esbuild src/app.js --bundle --outfile=dist/bundle.js && cp public/index.html dist/index.html && python3 -m http.server 3333 --directory dist
